Tool Output (file__read): {
  "name": "ioi-network-monorepo",
  "private": true,
  "workspaces": [
    "apps/*",
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "install:all": "npm install",
    "inspect:traineddata": "node ./scripts/inspect-traineddata.mjs",
    "dev:desktop": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dev-desktop.sh x11",
    "dev:desktop:wayland": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dev-desktop.sh wayland",
    "dryrun:desktop": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dry-run-desktop.sh x11",
    "dryrun:desktop:wayland": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dry-run-desktop.sh wayland",
    "dev:web": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/agent-studio",
    "dev:benchmarks": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "build:benchmarks": "npm run build --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "test:benchmarks": "node --test scripts/run-agent-model-matrix.test.mjs && node --test scripts/lib/agent-model-matrix.test.mjs && npm run test:generate-data --workspace=apps/benchmarks && npm run test:viewmodel --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "verify:benchmarks-generated": "node ./scripts/verify-benchmarks-generated.mjs",
    "verify:benchmarks": "npm run test:benchmarks && npm run typecheck:benchmarks && npm run verify:benchmarks-generated",
    "typecheck:benchmarks": "npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "build:ide": "npm run build --workspace=@ioi/agent-ide",
    "build:workspace-substrate": "npm run build --workspace=@ioi/workspace-substrate",
    "build:all": "npm run build --workspaces --if-present",
    "typecheck": "npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present",
    "lint": "npm run lint --workspaces --if-present"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.3.3",
    "prettier": "^3.2.5"
  }
}

details.output:
{
  "name": "ioi-network-monorepo",
  "private": true,
  "workspaces": [
    "apps/*",
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "install:all": "npm install",
    "inspect:traineddata": "node ./scripts/inspect-traineddata.mjs",
    "dev:desktop": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dev-desktop.sh x11",
    "dev:desktop:wayland": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dev-desktop.sh wayland",
    "dryrun:desktop": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dry-run-desktop.sh x11",
    "dryrun:desktop:wayland": "bash apps/autopilot/scripts/dry-run-desktop.sh wayland",
    "dev:web": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/agent-studio",
    "dev:benchmarks": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "build:benchmarks": "npm run build --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "test:benchmarks": "node --test scripts/run-agent-model-matrix.test.mjs && node --test scripts/lib/agent-model-matrix.test.mjs && npm run test:generate-data --workspace=apps/benchmarks && npm run test:viewmodel --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "verify:benchmarks-generated": "node ./scripts/verify-benchmarks-generated.mjs",
    "verify:benchmarks": "npm run test:benchmarks && npm run typecheck:benchmarks && npm run verify:benchmarks-generated",
    "typecheck:benchmarks": "npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/benchmarks",
    "build:ide": "npm run build --workspace=@ioi/agent-ide",
    "build:workspace-substrate": "npm run build --workspace=@ioi/workspace-substrate",
    "build:all": "npm run build --workspaces --if-present",
    "typecheck": "npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present",
    "lint": "npm run lint --workspaces --if-present"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.3.3",
    "prettier": "^3.2.5"
  }
}
